reason: Verify Graph OAuth/delta/immutable-ID/MIME/attachment/read/send/error behavior and Gmail compatibility.
Verify Outlook-only claims, invalid-delta bounded reset, cancellation, and no ambiguous-send retry.
Verify tokens remain outside SQLite and reconnect/compensation are crash-safe.
Verify provider-aware commands expose only fixed safe errors.
Verify provider choice, Outlook states, reconnect behavior, accessibility, and Chinese copy.
Verify no authorization URL/code/token/delta link/credential ref crosses the frontend boundary.
Verify implementation and owner docs match current Microsoft protocol behavior.
Verify provider conformance and parent V1 scope remain satisfied.
